body_txt: Most stories just end happily , with the villain defeated (or the basic problem resolved ) and the heroes triumphant . It remains the most common type of ending, even if it can be disdained by some . Far, far too common to provide examples . Specific types of Happy Ending include:  Contrast Downer Ending . Compare Bittersweet Ending . Has nothing whatsoever to do with Happy-Ending Massage .
